event_comments:
Thanks to all the meet volunteers! Course Design - Peter Golde, Keith Burdette; E-punch - Gina Nuss, Ing Uhlin; Finish - Chris Milsted, Evan Derickson, Registration - Ardis Dull, Todd Hammerstrom, Eileen Breseman, Sarah Keyt, Peter Golde, Julia Gold; Start - Steve Frederickson, Sherri Brady, Bob Forgrave, Bethany Rentz, Ryan Breseman, Ellen Hull; Control Pickup - Sue & Rolf Kuestner, Dave Dummeyer, Mike Ford; First Aid / Finish Greeter - Mike Schuh, Mike Ford; Newcomer Instruction - Rick Breseman, Judy Borish
Want to know how far you traveled? Follow these directions:
1. Open RouteGadget (see link above).
2. Draw your route.
3. Open Results and find your Course and then your Name.
4. Check both boxes by your name.
5. In the upper right menu area Click on the Splits box, immediately left of the Zoom In box.
6. Divide the number of pixels that is shown for your route by 790.
7. This will give the approximate length of your total route in kilometers.
Want to know how your route compared with others on the same course? Follow these directions:
1. Find the appropriate course. Check the box by the course. This will show the course on the map.
2. Open the course.
3. Check both boxes by two or more participants.
4. Click on the start arrow in the box in the bottom right corner of the page.
5. You will see how the participants move around the course.
